method: 16 qwen scouts (DashScope enable_search) → mechanical live-fetch vetting
note: feed_url present+live-feed => auto-ingestable RSS; else curated homepage (no feed / bot-blocked). arxiv categories now in _config ARXIV_FEEDS.

ingestable_feeds.name: CoRL Proceedings (RSS via arXiv mirror)
ingestable_feeds.why: CoRL官方无原生feed，但其全部论文均同步提交至arXiv cs.RO分类；arXiv提供稳定、权威的RSS feed，覆盖CoRL录用论文（标注'CoRL'字样），时效性强。

ingestable_feeds.name: arXiv Graphics
ingestable_feeds.why: Critical for 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS), NeRF variants, differentiable rendering, implicit/signed distance representat

ingestable_feeds.name: arXiv cs.CV / eess.SP / physics.app-ph
ingestable_feeds.why: Primary real-time dissemination channel for cutting-edge sensor modeling, calibration, and fusion work (e.g., 4D radar n

ingestable_feeds.name: arXiv Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition
ingestable_feeds.why: Primary category for SLAM, NeRF, 3DGS, depth estimation, and VLA/world-model related vision foundations.

ingestable_feeds.name: arXiv Robotics
ingestable_feeds.why: Core category for SLAM, VIO, aerial robotics, embodied VLA, and world-modeling with physical grounding.

ingestable_feeds.name: arXiv Multimedia
ingestable_feeds.why: Increasingly covers multimodal world modeling, audio-visual spatial grounding, and video-aware 3D generation — relevant

ingestable_feeds.name: arXiv Machine Learning
ingestable_feeds.why: Essential for learning-based depth estimation, self-supervised 3D representation learning, world-model priors, and found

ingestable_feeds.name: arXiv Artificial Intelligence
ingestable_feeds.why: Hosts foundational work on world models, reasoning, agent architectures, and cross-modal grounding relevant to spatial i

ingestable_feeds.name: nerfstudio
ingestable_feeds.why: Official, high-activity GitHub repo for nerfstudio — a leading framework for NeRF research and applications, with freque

ingestable_feeds.name: Google DeepMind Blog
ingestable_feeds.why: Official DeepMind blog with active RSS feed; publishes cutting-edge work on physical AI, vision-language-action models,

ingestable_feeds.name: Spatial Intelligence Newsletter (by Yannick Hold-Geoffroy)
ingestable_feeds.why: 由CVPR'24 Best Paper作者、空间感知与3D理解活跃研究者Hold-Geoffroy主笔，专注SLAM/VLA/NeRF/世界模型交叉进展，每期含论文精读+代码复现提示+工业落地观察，Substack feed稳定且被GitH

curated_no_feed.name: Papers With Code
curated_no_feed.why: Authoritative, daily-updated aggregator linking arXiv papers to open-source implementations (PyTorch/TensorFlow), with t

curated_no_feed.name: Semantic Scholar
curated_no_feed.why: 提供实时AI论文推送、高相关性排序、作者追踪与订阅功能，支持空间智能领域（如SLAM、NeRF、VLA）的语义过滤和学者动态监控，是研究者广泛使用的Google Scholar替代性高信噪比feed源。

curated_no_feed.name: ArXiv Sanity Preserver
curated_no_feed.why: 由Andrej Karpathy维护，基于arXiv每日更新自动推荐高分/高互动空间智能论文（含SLAM、3DGS、VLA等），支持用户自定义关键词+作者关注+RSS导出（通过第三方如Feedly桥接），被大量一线研究者用作日常信息入口。

curated_no_feed.name: Event Camera Community
curated_no_feed.why: Central hub for event camera research — hosts benchmarks (EVD, GEN1), datasets (CIFAR10-DVS), open-source tools (ESIM),

curated_no_feed.name: RSS (Robotics: Science and Systems)
curated_no_feed.why: 机器人领域旗舰会议，近年持续收录UAV自主导航、空中SLAM、开放词汇3D占据地图（如FreeOcc）等前沿工作，2026年接收港科大(广州)首个training-free aerial-semantic occupancy系统[1]。

curated_no_feed.name: CVPR 2025 Accepted Papers - Depth Estimation & 3D Vision Track
curated_no_feed.why: CVPR 是计算机视觉领域顶会，2025年深度估计方向接收了Depth Anything v2、Metric3D++、MoGe-Real等多篇奠基性工作，官方程序委员会公开发布细分track论文列表并附代码链接。

curated_no_feed.name: CVPR Accepted Papers RSS Feed
curated_no_feed.why: 官方主办的CVPR网站提供标准RSS feed，实时更新所有录用论文元数据（标题、作者、PDF链接），由IEEE/CVF直接维护，权威且稳定。

curated_no_feed.name: ICCV Accepted Papers (via CVF Open Access)
curated_no_feed.why: ICCV官方通过CVF平台提供规范RSS feed，与CVPR同架构，收录全部录用论文，含可直接下载的PDF链接，更新及时。

curated_no_feed.name: ECCV Papers (Open Access Archive)
curated_no_feed.why: ECCV官网（ecva.net）未提供RSS/Atom feed；其录用论文统一归档于Springer LNCS系列，无聚合式动态feed，仅支持手动浏览或DOI批量检索。

curated_no_feed.name: RSS (Robotics: Science and Systems) Official Proceedings
curated_no_feed.why: RSS官网（roboticsproceedings.org）提供完整PDF proceedings和DOI列表，但不提供RSS/Atom feed；需手动订阅或依赖第三方聚合（如arXiv cs.RO）。

curated_no_feed.name: awesome-NeRF-and-3DGS-SLAM
curated_no_feed.why: Curated, actively maintained list of NeRF and 3D Gaussian Splatting papers specifically for SLAM/Robotics domain, with l

curated_no_feed.name: LingBot-World
curated_no_feed.why: 蚂蚁Roboyant团队开源的世界模拟器，支持分钟级长时序、实时交互（<1s延迟）、多风格泛化，代码与检查点完整公开于GitHub/Hugging Face，持续迭代[6]

curated_no_feed.name: World Labs Blog
curated_no_feed.why: Official blog of World Labs — a leader in generative 3D and world model infrastructure; regularly posts on 3D Gaussian S

curated_no_feed.name: 机器之心
curated_no_feed.why: 持续深度报道3D视觉、SLAM、具身智能等前沿技术，含原创综述、论文解读与产业落地分析，中文领域权威信源

curated_no_feed.name: Meta AI Blog — Reality Labs Research
curated_no_feed.why: Official Meta AI blog with RSS feed; regularly features peer-reviewed work from Reality Labs Research on egocentric SLAM

curated_no_feed.name: ABot-World Studio
curated_no_feed.why: 高德地图推出的通用交互式世界模型平台，支持多模态输入生成可交互、可保存、可分享的3D世界，已开源代码与模型，且持续更新[2]

curated_no_feed.name: Genie Envisioner (GE)
curated_no_feed.why: AgiBot发布的首个面向机器人的真实世界统一视频生成平台，集成预测、策略学习与神经仿真闭环，基于3000小时带语言指令的机器人操作视频训练，强调‘想象-验证-执行’范式[8]

curated_no_feed.name: Wayve Blog
curated_no_feed.why: Active industry blog by Wayve documenting real-world deployment of end-to-end world models, neural SLAM, and embodied dr

curated_no_feed.name: IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters (RA-L) - Aerial Robotics Special Issue
curated_no_feed.why: IEEE RA-L定期组织Aerial Robotics专题，审稿严格、录用周期快，是UAV感知与控制领域高影响力期刊，被ICRA/RSS广泛引用。

curated_no_feed.name: IEEE Robotics & Automation Magazine
curated_no_feed.why: 面向工业界与学术界交叉应用的权威综述与实践期刊，高频报道无人机系统、传感器融合、现场部署案例[3][7]

curated_no_feed.name: IEEE Transactions on Pattern Analysis and Machine Intelligence (TPAMI)
curated_no_feed.why: AI与视觉领域最高影响力期刊（IF≈24），持续发表NeRF/3DGS/单目深度/位姿估计/VLA基础模型等空间智能核心算法[4][5]

curated_no_feed.name: IEEE Transactions on Robotics (T-RO)
curated_no_feed.why: 机器人领域公认的三大顶刊之一，代表理论与工程双重突破，年发文约100篇，最新影响因子7.8，JCR Q1[3][5][6]

curated_no_feed.name: IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters (RA-L)
curated_no_feed.why: IEEE旗舰Letters期刊，兼顾快速发表与严格审稿，广泛覆盖SLAM/VIO/3D重建/aerial等前沿方向，是T-RO的重要前哨和成果转化平台[3][6]

curated_no_feed.name: IEEE Sensors Journal
curated_no_feed.why: Top-tier peer-reviewed journal with dedicated sections on event cameras, millimeter-wave radar, polarization sensing, an

curated_no_feed.name: Visionary Laboratory
curated_no_feed.why: 专注WebGPU加速的3D高斯溅射（3DGS）浏览器与实时4D渲染，发布多项SOTA级技术突破并开源工具链

curated_no_feed.name: GRASP Laboratory, University of Pennsylvania
curated_no_feed.why: 由Vijay Kumar教授领导，是多旋翼无人机建模、控制、路径规划与协同控制的全球先驱实验室，长期产出顶会论文并开源大量工程代码与实验视频。

curated_no_feed.name: Depth Anything Official Blog
curated_no_feed.why: 由KAIST & Naver AI Team运营，提供Depth Anything系列技术解析、实时benchmark对比、部署指南及工业落地案例（如车载单目ADAS深度模块），RSS feed活跃更新（最新条目：2026-07-15）。

curated_no_feed.name: EmbodiedGen
curated_no_feed.why: 地平线联合多机构发布的机器人专用3D生成工具包，支持单图/文本生成带真实物理属性（质量、摩擦、水密性）的可动关节3D场景，配套arXiv论文与开源代码，聚焦具身仿真核心需求[7]

curated_no_feed.name: FusionBev Research Group (Tongji University & Xiamen University & SAIC)
curated_no_feed.why: Published state-of-the-art LiDAR + 4D radar fusion architecture FusionBev in Information Fusion (IF=18.6), addressing ge

curated_no_feed.name: ETH Zurich Autonomous Systems Lab
curated_no_feed.why: 长期主导视觉惯性里程计（VIO）与SLAM基础研究，曾深度参与Google Tango项目，开源DSO、OKVIS等标杆算法，持续在ICRA/IROS/TRO发表高影响力工作。

curated_no_feed.name: HKUST Aerial Robotics Group (ARCLab / UAV@HKUST)
curated_no_feed.why: VINS-Mono/VINS-Fusion开创性开源框架作者团队，强调算法-系统闭环与工程落地，2025年仍活跃发布多传感器融合状态估计新框架（如IET Cyber-Systems & Robotics论文）[8]，GitHub仓库持续维护

curated_no_feed.name: Technical University of Munich – Computer Vision Group
curated_no_feed.why: TUM是SLAM经典基准TUM-RGBD数据集发起方，长期深耕视觉/语义SLAM与稠密重建，近年在SAIL-Recon等万帧级场景回归工作中提供关键评测支持[2]，研究持续活跃。

curated_no_feed.name: University of Zurich Robotics and Perception Group
curated_no_feed.why: RPG是VIO/SLAM领域顶尖实验室，开发了DSO、LSD-SLAM、OpenVINS等核心开源系统，主导EuRoC、TUM-VI等权威VIO基准，2026年仍在ICRA/IROS持续输出鲁棒状态估计新成果。

curated_no_feed.name: ETH Zurich Robotics and Perception Group Blog
curated_no_feed.why: 长期引领VIO/SLAM/无人机感知前沿，MC-GS-SLAM等突破性工作出自该组[3]，RSS feed 活跃更新，含论文、代码、视频与系统部署细节

curated_no_feed.name: The Gradient
curated_no_feed.why: 由ML/AI一线研究者（含CVPR/ICRA作者）主理，深度覆盖空间智能前沿（如2026年已专题报道DUSt3R-VGGT演进、aerial VLA系统部署），RSS稳定更新，兼具技术深度与可读性，被多位SLAM/NeRF实验室成员公开列为

curated_no_feed.name: 3D视觉工坊
curated_no_feed.why: 微信公众号持续运营（最新资料截至2026年7月），聚焦工业3D视觉、SLAM、具身智能、无人机等，含大量代码/数据/视频课程资源，社群活跃度高

curated_no_feed.name: 具身智能技术分享--通往AGI之路
curated_no_feed.why: 系统性整理具身智能核心资料（含LLM+机器人、世界模型、仿真环境、数据集），2024年起持续更新，归档严谨、覆盖学术与产业双视角

curated_no_feed.name: Alex Yu's Blog
curated_no_feed.why: Alex Yu 是 3DGS（3D Gaussian Splatting）核心作者之一（CVPR 2023 Best Paper），持续发布技术深度解析、代码实践与世界建模前沿思考，博客含可验证 RSS feed，更新活跃（2026年6月仍

curated_no_feed.name: V2X-Radar Dataset Project
curated_no_feed.why: Active NeurIPS 2025 Spotlight project providing the first open, multi-modal, synchronized LiDAR + 4D radar + camera data

curated_no_feed.name: RynnWorld-4D
curated_no_feed.why: 达摩院最新具身智能世界模型，提出RGB-DF表征，同步生成RGB视频、深度图与光流，解决2D视频生成与3D物理世界间的表征鸿沟，论文与代码均公开且活跃维护[1]
